The Blast of Flavour

Authentic Indian street food, chaats, biryanis and grills — freshly prepared and served with warm hospitality.

View Our Menu Order Online
Welcome

Taste the tradition, feel the hospitality

At Dhamaka Bites we’re passionate about bringing the rich, vibrant flavours of India to our community. Whether you’re dining in, collecting, or feeding a celebration, we’re delighted to serve you.

Our mission is simple: share exceptional Indian cuisine, prepared with fresh ingredients, traditional recipes and genuine care.

Authentic FlavoursFresh IngredientsWarm Hospitality

Why people love us

  • Street-food classics done right
  • Generous portions, honest prices
  • Vegetarian, non-veg & egg specials
  • Catering for every celebration
  • Available on Just Eat & Deliveroo
